core_payload.content:
# N1Hub Operator Surfaces

## 1. Role
N1Hub Operator Surfaces owns the human-facing ingress and navigation layer of the habitat. It keeps assistant partnership, capsule chat ingress, control visibility, and graph reading surfaces together so one person can steer the system without losing contact with actual vault truth.

## 2. Operator Surface
This sub-hub groups `personal-ai-assistant`, `chat-to-capsules`, `ai-control-surface`, and `capsule-librarian-agent`. Together they define how a human enters the runtime, reads the graph, controls intelligence supply, and navigates live capsule state before more work is approved or created.

## 3. Operating Boundary
This sub-hub does not own deep refinement lanes, daemon execution, or long-horizon program routing. Those responsibilities belong to `intelligence-fabric`, `runtime-coordination`, and `program-lines`.

neuro_concentrate.summary: N1Hub Operator Surfaces groups the human-facing ingress and navigation surfaces of the habitat: Personal AI Assistant, Chat to Capsules, AI Control Surface, and Capsule Librarian Agent. It keeps assistant partnership, graph-grounded conversation, control visibility, and vault reading together so one operator can steer the system with clear access to live truth. This boundary matters because the runtime should feel calm and navigable to a person without hiding the actual capsule state underneath the interface.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Minted during N1Hub decomposition to isolate assistant, chat, control, and graph-reading surfaces from refinement lanes and daemon coordination.
